overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western-themed open world game showing a character in cowboy attire walking along a riverside trail and wading through a shallow river in a canyon environment. The clip features natural arid landscape with rocky cliffs, sparse vegetation, and a distant waterfall.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path on the hillside overlooking the river below

entered.detail: wide river with blue water flowing through the canyon valley
steep reddish-brown rock formation rising above the river
dry bushes and small shrubs along the trail edge
narrow dirt path winding along the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail on a hillside overlooking a wide river flowing through a canyon. Dry scrub vegetation lines the path while steep rocky cliffs rise in the distance across the river under a clear blue sky.

events.description: character steps from dirt bank into the river water, transitioning from land to water

agents.ego_description: wading into the river and walking through shallow water toward a distant waterfall

entered.detail: white cascading waterfall visible at the end of the canyon
large boulders protruding from the shallow water

segments.scene_description: The character enters the river and begins wading through the shallow water. A waterfall becomes visible in the distance at the end of the canyon, while large rocks emerge from the riverbed. The surrounding cliffs frame the scene as the water ripples around the character's legs.

scene_state.functional_zone: river canyon with waterfall and steep walls

events.description: character turns slightly while wading through deeper water, changing direction toward the canyon wall

agents.ego_description: wading through deeper water near the waterfall and looking around the canyon environment

entered.detail: steep rock wall rising on the right side of the river

segments.scene_description: The character continues wading through deeper water as the waterfall moves to the left side of the frame. The canyon walls rise steeply on both sides, with the right wall becoming more prominent. The water becomes slightly deeper and the riverbed transitions to sandy bottom.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow river canyon with high walls

agents.ego_description: continuing to wade along the riverbed between high canyon walls, moving with the current

entered.detail: tall rock wall now dominating the right side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The character wades through the river in a narrower section of the canyon where the walls rise higher on both sides. The waterfall is now behind and out of view, while the river continues flowing between the steep rock formations. Sparse vegetation appears along the right bank as the journey continues downstream.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a high hillside trail down into the depths of a narrow river canyon. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path lined with dry scrub, overlooking a wide river and distant rocky cliffs under a clear blue sky. As the character descends and enters the water, the scene shifts to a first-person perspective of wading through shallow ripples and around large riverbed rocks, with a distant waterfall appearing at the canyon's end. The camera then follows the character into deeper, sandy waters as the canyon walls rise steeply on both sides and the waterfall drifts to the left of the frame. Finally, the environment narrows further, leaving the waterfall behind as the character wades between towering rock formations and sparse vegetation along the right bank.
